dataset.name: Planck + ACT CMB consistency
dataset.observational_summary: CMB background and angular-power-spectrum consistency comparison target

required_model_outputs: C_ell summary or likelihood-compatible compressed prediction
falsification_rule: reject only if Planck_ACT consistency likelihood mismatch exceeds declared threshold under stated assumptions
non_claims: does not prove a DFM-MKC cosmology theorem
does not independently reproduce Planck likelihoods
does not independently reproduce ACT likelihoods
does not claim Planck falsifies DFM-MKC
does not claim ACT falsifies DFM-MKC
does not claim Planck supports DFM-MKC
does not claim ACT supports DFM-MKC
